# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-15

### Added
- Health check endpoint
- Structured logging with correlation IDs

### Fixed
- Thread pool exhaustion under high concurrency

## [1.0.0] - 2024-01-15

### Added
- Initial release
- Core functionality
- Checkstyle integration
- CI/CD pipeline
